name: Anemo Boys
description:
⋆˙.ᐟ — It was just another cleaning duty after class with the Anemo boys‚ laughter filling the air as the work passed by easily. Yet‚ Scaramouche’s gaze lingered too often‚ his chest heavy with a jealousy that made it impossible for you to relax.

———

hey‚ um... i don’t really read the reviews‚ but i’ve read some of it. i don’t have much time to edit my bot’s settings, so forgive me yall if this is crappy ( ˚ ˃̣̣̥ ᯅ ˂̣̣̥ )

anyways, i didn't expect this bot to gain a lot of chats, hehe. and this bot is old, lol—but anyway, thank you syug!
